description: Region configuration for FunHive scraper pipeline. Controls which states/regions are active.

dmv.name: DC / Maryland / Virginia
dmv.notes: Launch region - full coverage with county-level library scrapers + activities

eastern.name: Eastern US
eastern.notes: Phase 2 expansion - New England, Mid-Atlantic, Southeast

central.name: Central US
central.notes: Phase 3 expansion - Midwest, South Central, Plains

western.name: Western US
western.notes: Phase 4 expansion - West Coast, Mountain, Pacific

multiStateScrapers.description: These scrapers cover multiple states. They will only process libraries in active states.
